creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
This was fixed.  But then it happened again a couple of days ago.  All the mirrors are in sync again now.

I like the suggestion in comment #5 though.  I'll see what I can do about adding a way to monitor the mirror sync status.  I don't think it's feasible to show the progress of an individual pkg-master->pkg-mirror sync.  We should however be able to show whether a mirror has the latest sets.

I'll put that somewhere on my (endless) todo list.
